title: MCQQuiz props
description: Multiple-choice self-test with instant feedback, per-question explanations, persistent answers, score meter, and filter bar. Ideal for end-of-section assessment.

options.description: Answer choices. Every distractor MUST be a plausible misconception from the lecture content, not a random wrong answer.

explanation.description: Shown after answering. Explains why the correct answer is right AND why common distractors are wrong.
